summary: Fetched NousResearch/hermes-agent GitHub repo, official docs, release notes, and third-party comparisons
outcome: Gathered comprehensive findings on architecture, use cases, differentiators, and limitations. Key sources: README, AGENTS.md, hermes-agent.nousresearch.com/docs, v0.2.0 release notes, yuv.ai, awesomeagents.ai, rywalker.com

summary: Identified core differentiators vs LangChain, LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen, smolagents, OpenAI Assistants
outcome: Hermes unique combination: persistent multi-level memory with FTS5, autonomous skill creation (open AgentSkills spec), multi-platform gateway (Telegram/Discord/Slack/etc), RL/SFT data generation, self-evolution research (ICLR 2026 Oral via GEPA)

summary: Full first-pass research and report generation for hermes-agent
outcome: Completed report.md covering architecture, use cases, framework comparisons, and limitations. Key finding: Hermes is unique in combining autonomous skill creation (AgentSkills spec), multi-level cross-session memory, multi-platform gateway, and RL/SFT data generation. Self-evolution companion repo accepted as ICLR 2026 Oral.

summary: Deep research on OpenClaw framework: GitHub repo, official docs, architecture, ClawHub skills, comparisons, licensing, community metrics
outcome: Fetched github.com/openclaw/openclaw (315k stars, MIT, TypeScript/Node.js), docs.openclaw.ai, ClawHub registry (13,729+ skills), awesome-openclaw-agents (162 templates/24 categories), OpenClaw-RL (2.9k stars), Mission Control (2.4k stars), multiple comparison articles vs Hermes. Key architecture: Gateway on ws://127.0.0.1:18789, SOUL.md/AGENTS.md/MEMORY.md/HEARTBEAT.md file-based memory, Lane Queue serial execution, MCPorter MCP bridge, 23+ messaging platforms, Claude/GPT/Gemini/Ollama model support, npm deployment.

summary: OpenClaw vs Hermes key differentiators identified from multiple sources
outcome: OpenClaw: always-on 24/7 personal assistant, messaging-gateway-centric, file-based Markdown memory (SOUL.md/MEMORY.md), 13,729+ SKILL.md community skills, 315k GitHub stars, MIT, Node.js. Hermes: terminal-native, Python, multi-level programmatic memory with FTS5, autonomous skill creation (AgentSkills spec), RL/SFT data generation, self-evolution (ICLR 2026). OpenClaw broader platform reach; Hermes deeper research/dev focus.

summary: Deep research session on OpenClaw framework for comparison with Hermes Agent
outcome: Produced openclaw-research.md with full sourced findings: 315k GitHub stars (MIT, Node.js/TS), Gateway architecture (ws://127.0.0.1:18789), Markdown file-based memory (SOUL.md/MEMORY.md/AGENTS.md/HEARTBEAT.md), MCPorter MCP bridge, Lane Queue serial execution, 23+ messaging platforms, 13,729+ ClawHub SKILL.md skills, 10+ model providers (Claude Opus 4.6 recommended), npm/Docker/daemon deployment, OpenAI-backed 501(c)(3) foundation, significant security incidents (ClawHavoc, 21k exposed instances). Key contrast with Hermes: OpenClaw is messaging-gateway personal assistant (breadth/platform reach); Hermes is terminal-native self-improving dev agent (depth/autonomy).

summary: Researched OpenClaw for focused Hermes vs OpenClaw comparison
outcome: OpenClaw: 315k stars, TypeScript/Node.js, OpenAI-backed 501c3, 23+ messaging platforms, 13,729 ClawHub skills, HEARTBEAT proactive ops, multiple 2026 security incidents (ClawHavoc, 21k exposed instances, Moltbook breach). Key contrast: OpenClaw wins on ecosystem/adoption; Hermes wins on autonomous skill creation, memory depth, RL integration.

summary: Focused Hermes vs OpenClaw comparison written to hermes-vs-openclaw.md
outcome: Detailed comparison across 10 dimensions. Key findings: OpenClaw wins on ecosystem (315k stars, 13,729 skills, 23+ platforms); Hermes wins on autonomous skill creation, memory depth, PTC execution, RL integration, and security record. OpenClaw had multiple critical 2026 incidents (ClawHavoc, 21k exposed instances, Moltbook breach). Governance divergence notable: OpenClaw now OpenAI-backed 501c3.
